summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ArabeSimplement.fr MVP - Next.js 15 Arabic learning platform with functional shopping cart, authentication, and course catalog

ui_bugs.issue: No contact form found on contact page - navigation exists but form is missing

integration_issues.issue: Cart icon in header doesn't navigate directly to panier page correctly

passed_tests: Homepage hero section with working CTAs
Complete navigation header with all required links
Boutique page with 3 formations and filter buttons
Formation detail pages with add to cart functionality
Shopping cart add/remove items and total calculation
Empty cart vs filled cart states
Checkout stepper visible on cart page
Responsive design - desktop, tablet, mobile viewports
Formation card components with proper data-testids
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Add contact form to contact page (/contact) 2. Fix header cart icon navigation to properly route to /panier page
success_percentage: frontend: 90% - Core e-commerce functionality working, minor navigation and form issues
